name: vtex-se-toolkit
description: Skills for the VTEX Solution Engineering team to run on their Rocketlane pre-sales opportunities: weekly status reports, pipeline/portfolio triage, discovery & solution-design briefs, POC/demo readiness checks, logging English notes back to Rocketlane, and an interactive status board to bulk-update project statuses. Cross-references Rocketlane data with Slack project channels (reconciling the two), the live VTEX account configuration, and the Atlas architecture knowledge base. Read-only by default; the log-note and status-board skills write to Rocketlane only after explicit confirmation.
